column3: Morning Run, First one back in SB for year 2

column11: the feeling after, the adrenaline, is insanely good. I feel super content and happy.
don’t eat past 8. being full from the night before makes it super difficult to run the next morning. and drink water!! you’re dehydrated.

focused on my breath during the run and no music: honestly made it easier to keep stamina

I think the dairy really killed me last night, that or something else that’s not normal (lack of sleep?)
ran the whole time! next run under 9

column5: a maze of fallen trees and puddles 😵‍💫
column11: 8 miles, 3 weeks to go, building long run by 2 miles next weekend

1/6 runs this week
Totally this week: 24 miles
-3.7
20.3 miles left to go
chill start to the week run

post running reflection: this run, I focused on how I would appreciate the pain I felt now for the rest of the day. this really helped me push further and I feel proud of my efforts today! next time: I need to combine my fitness effort with my nutrition efforts because they are clashing and it makes it harder to run! With eating, I need to eat at scheduled times and get in a rythmn for my body for when it expects to have food. This will be so helpful because I need to stop eating late at night bc I have a stomach ache in the morning!
next run go under 9 and also know your route beforehand.
